Jiaxuan Project — Whole Cohort

Author

Tianqi Ouyang

Published

April 9, 2026

1 Setup

Code 
# Force UTF-8 locale so kable captions and other strings render real Unicode
# (e.g. em-dash) instead of <U+2014> escape sequences.
invisible(Sys.setlocale("LC_ALL", "en_US.UTF-8"))
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidycmprsk)
library(ggsurvfit)
library(gtsummary)
library(flextable)
library(rvg)
library(officer)

# Output directory for downloadable Word tables (placed under docs/ so the
# rendered website can serve them from ../tables/whole/<name>.docx).
docx_dir <- "docs/tables/whole"
dir.create(docx_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Output directory for editable PowerPoint copies of every figure. A knitr
# plot hook (defined below) saves last_plot() to docs/pptx/whole/<label>.pptx
# and appends a download link after the figure in the rendered HTML.
dir.create("docs/pptx/whole", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
pptx_dir <- normalizePath("docs/pptx/whole", mustWork = TRUE)
# Relative path for download links from rendered docs/qmd/*.html
pptx_rel_prefix <- "../pptx/whole/"

# Persist the chunk-label -> pptx-path mapping so the chunk hook can emit
# the download link only when the .pptx was actually written.
.pptx_written <- new.env()

# fig.process runs in the chunk eval context (so last_plot() is fresh) and
# writes an editable .pptx alongside the saved figure.
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.process = function(filename) {
  label <- knitr::opts_current$get("label")
  if (is.null(label)) return(filename)
  p <- tryCatch(ggplot2::last_plot(), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(p) || !inherits(p, "ggplot")) return(filename)
  pptx_path <- file.path(pptx_dir, paste0(label, ".pptx"))
  tryCatch({
    doc <- officer::read_pptx()
    doc <- officer::add_slide(doc, layout = "Title and Content",
                              master = "Office Theme")
    doc <- officer::ph_with(doc, rvg::dml(ggobj = p),
                            location = officer::ph_location_type(type = "body"))
    print(doc, target = pptx_path)
    .pptx_written[[label]] <- paste0(pptx_rel_prefix, label, ".pptx")
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
  filename
})

# A "chunk" hook fires after the whole chunk is rendered: append the link.
local({
  default_chunk_hook <- knitr::knit_hooks$get("chunk")
  knitr::knit_hooks$set(chunk = function(x, options) {
    out <- default_chunk_hook(x, options)
    label <- options$label
    if (!is.null(label) && !is.null(.pptx_written[[label]])) {
      rel <- .pptx_written[[label]]
      link <- sprintf(
        '\n\n<p style="margin-top:-0.5em;font-size:0.9em;"><a href="%s" download>📊 Download as PowerPoint (editable)</a></p>\n\n',
        rel)
      out <- paste0(out, link)
    }
    out
  })
})

# Save a gtsummary table to a Word document.
save_tbl_docx <- function(tbl, docx_name) {
  ft <- gtsummary::as_flex_table(tbl)
  flextable::save_as_docx(ft, path = file.path(docx_dir,
                                               paste0(docx_name, ".docx")))
  invisible(tbl)
}

# Load whole-cohort final_master from Jiaxuan data management
dat <- readRDS("jiaxuan_final_master.rds")

# Create eGFR ratio: CKD-EPI Cr-Cys (unindexed) / Cockcroft-Gault
# Also create per-10 mL/min rescaled versions of cockcroft and CKD-EPI for
# reporting (HRs per 1 mL/min are clinically uninterpretable; convention in
# nephro-onc is per 10 mL/min — bio_agent confirmed). Adjusters keep raw scale.
dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    # Ratio uses UNCAPPED eGFR
    egfr_ratio    = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex / cockcroft,
    egfr_ratio_per10 = -egfr_ratio * 10,  # per 0.1-unit *decrease* reporting scale
    egfr_discrepancy = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex - cockcroft,
    # per-10-mL/min DECLINE reporting scale for eGFR discrepancy: HR for this
    # variable reads as the multiplicative change in subHR per 10 mL/min lower
    # discrepancy (i.e., when CKD-EPI Cr-Cys is 10 mL/min farther below CG).
    egfr_disc_per10dec = -egfr_discrepancy / 10,
    # Sensitivity-analysis eGFR ratio (Section 11):
    # numerator = CKD-EPI 2012 cystatin C only (baseline_cys_c_egfr_unindexed)
    # denominator = CKD-EPI 2021 race-free creatinine only (baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed)
    # (Both unindexed; the ratio itself is invariant to whether indexed or unindexed
    # because BSA cancels.) per10 below is the per-0.1 DECLINE reporting scale.
    egfr_ratio_sens       = baseline_cys_c_egfr_unindexed / baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed,
    egfr_ratio_sens_per10 = -egfr_ratio_sens * 10,
    # Percent-difference eGFR (new primary exposure):
    # egfr_diff_pct = 100 * (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys unindexed - Cockcroft-Gault) / Cockcroft-Gault
    # egfr_diff_pct_per10: HR reads as multiplicative change per 10 percentage-point DECLINE.
    egfr_diff_pct         = 100 * (ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex - cockcroft) / cockcroft,
    egfr_diff_pct_per10   = -egfr_diff_pct / 10,
    # Percent-difference eGFR for sensitivity analysis:
    # numerator - denominator = CKD-EPI 2012 CysC - CKD-EPI 2021 Cr, both unindexed.
    egfr_diff_pct_sens        = 100 * (baseline_cys_c_egfr_unindexed - baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed) / baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed,
    egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10  = -egfr_diff_pct_sens / 10,
    cockcroft_per10 = cockcroft / 10,
    ckd_epi_per10   = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex / 10
  )

2 Table 1: Baseline Characteristics (Overall + Cisplatin / Carboplatin)

Table 1 is now stratified by platin_group. Columns show the overall cohort, the cisplatin subgroup, and the carboplatin subgroup side-by-side, with a between-group p-value in the final column (Wilcoxon rank-sum for continuous, Fisher exact for categorical with expected cell < 5, else χ²). The platin_group, carbo_AUC, and cis_dose-related variables are removed from the row list because they are collinear with the stratification column.

Missing counts. missing = "ifany" — each variable’s Unknown row appears only when the variable actually has missing values in that column. In practice this cohort is complete on the entire adjuster / predictor set once record 911 is dropped upstream in jiaxuan_data.qmd: pre_HGB_45days, pre_PLT_45days, pre_ALB_45days, and pre_CRE_45days all show 0/943 missing, and the age / sex / BMI / smoking / thyroid / steroids / RPDR-comorbidity / eGFR variables are also fully populated. The only NA-by-design variables in the row list are carbo_AUC / carbo_AUC_cat (NA for cisplatin patients) and cis_dose / cis_dose_high (NA for carboplatin patients). Consequently, the “Excluded (missing cov.)” column in the Section 4 / 7 / 11 summary tables is 0 for every outcome.

Code 
dat %>%
  dplyr::select(
    age, age_cat, sex, race, ethnicity, tumor_stage, cancer_type_cat_7,
    platin_group, carbo_AUC, carbo_AUC_cat, cis_dose, cis_dose_high,
    ici, Bevacizumab, Paclitaxel, Pemetrexed, Doxorubicin, Etoposide,
    Gemcitabine, Pertuzumab, Trastuzumab, Docetaxel, other_chemo, Administered_alone,
    hiv_rpdr, thyroid, smoking, steroids,
    cci, score, ecog_score, bmi, bmi_cat,
    pre_HGB_45days, pre_PLT_45days, pre_ALB_45days, pre_CRE_45days,
    baseline_cys_c, baseline_cre, cr_cys,
    baseline_cre_egfr, baseline_cys_c_egfr,
    ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys, ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex,
    cockcroft, egfr_ratio
  ) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = platin_group,
    statistic = list(age ~ "{mean} ({sd})"),
    missing = "ifany"
  ) %>%
  add_overall(last = FALSE) %>%
  add_p() %>%
  modify_header(label ~ "**Characteristic**") %>%
  modify_spanning_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**Platinum group**")

1 Mean (SD); n (%); Median (Q1, Q3)
2 Wilcoxon rank sum test; Pearson’s Chi-squared test; Fisher’s exact test

2.1 Follow-up time (days from baseline to last known status)

days_last_follow_up = last_follow_up_date − baseline_sample_date. Four alternative definitions of “follow-up time” are shown side-by-side so the reader can pick the most defensible one for their purpose:

  • A — Raw days: unrestricted calendar follow-up (median dominated by patients who kept returning for years).
  • B — Raw days, ≤ 365 days: restricts to patients whose last-known contact was within 1 year of baseline (drops the long tail of years-later return visits; more comparable across patients).
  • C — Analytic, capped at 90 days: min(days_last_follow_up, 90) — the risk time actually contributed to the 90-day Fine-Gray / Cox models.
  • D — Analytic (capped at 90) & ≤ 365 days raw: same as C but excluding the long-tail returners.
Code 
followup_summary <- dat %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, platin_group, days_last_follow_up) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(days_last_follow_up)

fmt_med_iqr <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 0) return("—")
  sprintf("%.0f [%.0f, %.0f]", median(x), quantile(x, 0.25), quantile(x, 0.75))
}

groups_split <- function(f) {
  x_all <- f(followup_summary$days_last_follow_up)
  x_cis <- f(followup_summary$days_last_follow_up[followup_summary$platin_group == "Cisplatin"])
  x_car <- f(followup_summary$days_last_follow_up[followup_summary$platin_group == "Carboplatin"])
  list(Overall = x_all, Cisplatin = x_cis, Carboplatin = x_car)
}

fu_row <- function(label, xs) {
  tibble::tibble(
    Interpretation                      = label,
    `Overall N`                         = length(xs$Overall),
    `Overall — Median [IQR] (days)`     = fmt_med_iqr(xs$Overall),
    `Cisplatin N`                       = length(xs$Cisplatin),
    `Cisplatin — Median [IQR] (days)`   = fmt_med_iqr(xs$Cisplatin),
    `Carboplatin N`                     = length(xs$Carboplatin),
    `Carboplatin — Median [IQR] (days)` = fmt_med_iqr(xs$Carboplatin)
  )
}

def_A <- function(v) v
def_B <- function(v) v[v <= 365]
def_C <- function(v) pmin(v, 90)
def_D <- function(v) pmin(v[v <= 365], 90)

followup_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  fu_row("A — Raw days",                                   groups_split(def_A)),
  fu_row("B — Raw days, ≤ 365 days",                       groups_split(def_B)),
  fu_row("C — Analytic (capped at 90 days), whole cohort", groups_split(def_C)),
  fu_row("D — Analytic (capped at 90 days), ≤ 365 days",   groups_split(def_D))
)

flextable::flextable(followup_tbl) |>
  flextable::set_caption("Follow-up time from baseline to last known status (whole cohort). Four alternative definitions shown side-by-side.") |>
  flextable::autofit()

3 eGFR Ratio and Discordance Distributions (Overall)

3.1 eGFR Ratio distribution

Red bins highlight the region below ratio = 1 (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys eGFR below Cockcroft-Gault, consistent with muscle-wasting / sarcopenia); gray bins are the region above.

Code 
n_lt <- sum(dat$egfr_ratio < 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)
n_av <- sum(!is.na(dat$egfr_ratio))
cat(sprintf(
  "> **eGFR ratio < 0.9:** %d / %d (%.1f%%) of the whole cohort.\n",
  n_lt, n_av, 100 * n_lt / n_av))

eGFR ratio < 0.9: 301 / 943 (31.9%) of the whole cohort.

Code 
ratio_hist <- dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(egfr_ratio)) %>%
  mutate(side = ifelse(egfr_ratio < 1, "neg", "pos"))

ggplot(ratio_hist, aes(x = egfr_ratio, fill = side)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count) / sum(after_stat(count)) * 100),
                 binwidth = 0.1, boundary = 0,
                 color = "black", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(neg = "#E31A1C", pos = "grey60"),
                    guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of eGFR Ratio (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys unindexed / Cockcroft-Gault)",
       x = "eGFR Ratio",
       y = "Percent of Patients (%)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 3, 0.2)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

3.2 eGFR Discordance distribution

Signed eGFR discordance = CKD-EPI Cr-Cys unindexed − Cockcroft-Gault (mL/min). Red bins highlight the negative side (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys below Cockcroft-Gault — the direction that flags reduced cystatin-based eGFR relative to creatinine-based, consistent with muscle wasting / sarcopenia); gray bins are the positive side.

Code 
disc_hist <- dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(egfr_discrepancy)) %>%
  mutate(side = ifelse(egfr_discrepancy < 0, "neg", "pos"))

ggplot(disc_hist, aes(x = egfr_discrepancy, fill = side)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count) / sum(after_stat(count)) * 100),
                 binwidth = 5, boundary = 0,
                 color = "black", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(neg = "#E31A1C", pos = "grey60"),
                    guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of eGFR Discordance (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys − Cockcroft-Gault)",
       x = "eGFR Discordance (mL/min)",
       y = "Percent of Patients (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

3.3 eGFR Difference (%) distribution

Signed eGFR difference (%) = 100 × (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys unindexed − Cockcroft-Gault) / Cockcroft-Gault. Concordance sits at 0 %. Red bins highlight the negative side (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys below CG by more than 0 %, consistent with muscle wasting / sarcopenia); gray bins are the positive side.

Code 
diffpct_hist <- dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(egfr_diff_pct)) %>%
  mutate(side = ifelse(egfr_diff_pct < 0, "neg", "pos"))

ggplot(diffpct_hist, aes(x = egfr_diff_pct, fill = side)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count) / sum(after_stat(count)) * 100),
                 binwidth = 5, boundary = 0,
                 color = "black", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(neg = "#E31A1C", pos = "grey60"),
                    guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of eGFR Difference (%): 100 × (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys − CG) / CG",
       x = "eGFR Difference (%)",
       y = "Percent of Patients (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

4 Fine-Gray Models — eGFR Difference (%) (per 10 % decline, adjusted for Cockcroft-Gault)

Each table below shows univariable (one variable at a time) and multivariable Fine-Gray subdistribution hazard ratios side-by-side. A Word version of every table is saved during render — click any link below to download:

  • Anemia Grade 2 · Anemia Grade 3
  • Thrombocytopenia Grade 2 · Thrombocytopenia Grade 3
  • AKI Grade 2 · AKI (KDIGO)
  • Composite Grade 2 AEs · Composite Grade 3 AEs
  • Overall Hospitalization · Platinum-Related Hospitalization
  • 90-Day Death (Cox PH)
Code 
.adj_set <- function(pred_var, pre_labs, egfr_adj) {
  adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
           "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
           "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
           "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  # Drop platin_group when predictor requires dose data (carbo-only after drop_na)
  if (grepl("dose_discrep", pred_var)) adj <- setdiff(adj, "platin_group")
  if (egfr_adj == "cockcroft") adj <- c(adj, "cockcroft")
  if (egfr_adj == "ckd_epi")   adj <- c(adj, "ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex")
  if (!is.null(pre_labs)) adj <- c(adj, pre_labs)
  adj
}

# fg_model: returns univariable + multivariable merged Fine-Gray table.
# If docx_name is supplied, also saves the table as a .docx in docx_dir.
fg_model <- function(time_var, status_var, pred_var, pre_labs = NULL,
                     egfr_adj = c("none", "cockcroft", "ckd_epi"),
                     docx_name = NULL) {
  egfr_adj <- match.arg(egfr_adj)
  adj <- .adj_set(pred_var, pre_labs, egfr_adj)
  all_vars <- c(pred_var, adj)

  # Multivariable
  fmla_mv <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ ",
    paste(all_vars, collapse = " + ")
  ))
  tbl_mv <- tidycmprsk::crr(fmla_mv, failcode = 1, data = dat) %>%
    tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,
                   pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3)) %>%
    add_n()

  # Univariable: one Fine-Gray fit per variable
  y_call <- str2lang(sprintf("Surv(%s, %s)", time_var, status_var))
  tbl_uv <- rlang::inject(
    tbl_uvregression(
      data = dat,
      method = tidycmprsk::crr,
      y = !!y_call,
      include = dplyr::all_of(all_vars),
      exponentiate = TRUE,
      pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3),
      method.args = list(failcode = 1)
    )
  )

  out <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(tbl_uv, tbl_mv),
    tab_spanner = c("**Univariable**", "**Multivariable**")
  )

  if (!is.null(docx_name)) save_tbl_docx(out, docx_name)
  out
}

# cox_model: same signature/output for the 90-day death analysis (Cox PH).
cox_model <- function(time_var, status_var, pred_var, pre_labs = NULL,
                      egfr_adj = c("none", "cockcroft", "ckd_epi"),
                      docx_name = NULL) {
  egfr_adj <- match.arg(egfr_adj)
  adj <- .adj_set(pred_var, pre_labs, egfr_adj)
  all_vars <- c(pred_var, adj)

  fmla_mv <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ ",
    paste(all_vars, collapse = " + ")
  ))
  tbl_mv <- survival::coxph(fmla_mv, data = dat) %>%
    tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,
                   pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3)) %>%
    add_n()

  y_call <- str2lang(sprintf("Surv(%s, %s)", time_var, status_var))
  tbl_uv <- rlang::inject(
    tbl_uvregression(
      data = dat,
      method = survival::coxph,
      y = !!y_call,
      include = dplyr::all_of(all_vars),
      exponentiate = TRUE,
      pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3)
    )
  )

  out <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(tbl_uv, tbl_mv),
    tab_spanner = c("**Univariable**", "**Multivariable**")
  )

  if (!is.null(docx_name)) save_tbl_docx(out, docx_name)
  out
}

1 HR = Hazard Ratio, CI = Confidence Interval

5 Cause-Specific Hazard Models — eGFR Difference (%) (per 10 % decline, adjusted for Cockcroft-Gault)

Code 
csh_model <- function(time_var, status_var, pred_var, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
           "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
           "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
           "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid","cockcroft")
  if (grepl("dose_discrep", pred_var)) adj <- setdiff(adj, "platin_group")
  if (!is.null(pre_labs)) adj <- c(adj, pre_labs)
  # Cause-specific: treat death (status == 2) as censored
  d <- dat
  d$csh_status <- ifelse(d[[status_var]] == 1, 1L, 0L)
  fmla <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", csh_status) ~ ",
    paste(c(pred_var, adj), collapse = " + ")
  ))
  survival::coxph(fmla, data = d) %>%
    tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,
                   pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3)) %>%
    add_n()
}

Gemcitabine 943 5.49 2.96, 10.2 <0.001 943 7.88 1.76, 35.2 0.007
ici 943 2.41 1.28, 4.51 0.006 943 0.66 0.30, 1.44 0.299
bmi 943 0.95 0.90, 1.01 0.113 943 0.88 0.81, 0.95 0.002

thyroid 943 0.62 0.24, 1.59 0.322 943 0.61 0.22, 1.69 0.345
cockcroft 943 1.00 0.99, 1.01 0.528 943 1.00 0.99, 1.01 0.903
1 HR = Hazard Ratio, CI = Confidence Interval
NoteWhy anchor at the median (subHR = 1 at the reference)

Three reasons to anchor at the median:

  1. Interpretability: “A patient with eGFR ratio of 0.8 has ~1.5× the subHR compared to a typical patient (at the median).”
  2. Stability: The median sits in the densest part of the data, so estimates near it have the tightest confidence intervals. The CIs fan out as you move away — you can see this in the plots.
  3. No arbitrary choice: If we picked 1.0 arbitrarily, the plot would look almost identical here (because median ≈ 1), but in cohorts where the median is 0.9 or 1.1, picking 1.0 would either shift or distort the curve without changing the actual model.

6 Linear subHR Curves — eGFR Difference (%) (raw scale)

Notep-value convention

The p-value shown in each panel subtitle below is Bonferroni-adjusted across the six primary manuscript-figure AE outcomes (platinum-related hospitalisation, overall hospitalisation, 90-day mortality, grade ≥ 3 anemia, grade ≥ 3 thrombocytopenia, acute kidney injury): p_Bonf = min(raw p × 6, 1). n = 6 is displayed alongside for transparency. Raw Wald p is preserved in the Section 4 regression tables and their downloadable Word versions.

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_ratio <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                    outcome_label, x_axis = c("ratio","percentile"),
                                    n_bonf = 6) {
  x_axis <- match.arg(x_axis)
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_diff_pct", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  adj_df <- d[, c(base_adj, extra_adj), drop = FALSE]
  X_adj <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X <- cbind(egfr_diff_pct = d$egfr_diff_pct, X_adj)

  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])

  fit <- cmprsk::crr(ftime = time_num, fstatus = stat_num,
                     cov1 = X, failcode = 1)

  beta   <- fit$coef[1]
  V_beta <- fit$var[1, 1]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  # subHR per 10 percentage-point decline and per IQR decline (delta-method CIs)
  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr10  <- exp(-10 * beta);     hr10_l <- exp(-10 * beta - 1.96 * 10 * se_b);   hr10_u <- exp(-10 * beta + 1.96 * 10 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);   hri_l  <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "subHR per 10 %% decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.1f %%): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.1f, %.1f] %%",
    hr10, hr10_l, hr10_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_diff_pct, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  if (x_axis == "percentile") {
    ecdf_fn      <- ecdf(d$egfr_diff_pct)
    grid_display <- ecdf_fn(grid_x) * 100
    ref_display  <- ecdf_fn(ref_x)  * 100
    xlab <- "Percentile of eGFR Difference (%)"
  } else {
    grid_display <- grid_x
    ref_display  <- ref_x
    xlab <- "eGFR difference (%): 100 × (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys − CG) / CG"
  }

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x     = grid_display,
    subhr = exp(log_hr),
    lcl   = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl   = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = subhr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_display, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    labs(x = xlab, y = "subHR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))

  p + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4))
}

plot_cox_linear_ratio <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                  outcome_label, x_axis = c("ratio","percentile"),
                                  n_bonf = 6) {
  x_axis <- match.arg(x_axis)
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_diff_pct", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  fmla <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ egfr_diff_pct + ",
    paste(c(base_adj, extra_adj), collapse = " + ")
  ))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)

  beta   <- coef(fit)["egfr_diff_pct"]
  V_beta <- vcov(fit)["egfr_diff_pct", "egfr_diff_pct"]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr10  <- exp(-10 * beta);     hr10_l <- exp(-10 * beta - 1.96 * 10 * se_b);   hr10_u <- exp(-10 * beta + 1.96 * 10 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);   hri_l  <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "HR per 10 %% decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.1f %%): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.1f, %.1f] %%",
    hr10, hr10_l, hr10_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_diff_pct, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  if (x_axis == "percentile") {
    ecdf_fn      <- ecdf(d$egfr_diff_pct)
    grid_display <- ecdf_fn(grid_x) * 100
    ref_display  <- ecdf_fn(ref_x)  * 100
    xlab <- "Percentile of eGFR Difference (%)"
  } else {
    grid_display <- grid_x
    ref_display  <- ref_x
    xlab <- "eGFR difference (%): 100 × (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys − CG) / CG"
  }

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x   = grid_display,
    hr  = exp(log_hr),
    lcl = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = hr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_display, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    labs(x = xlab, y = "HR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))

  p + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4))
}

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

7 Linear subHR Curves — eGFR Discrepancy (raw scale)

7.0 Summary table: Fine-Gray subHR per 10 mL/min decline in eGFR discrepancy

One row per outcome. Multivariable Fine-Gray model fit with egfr_disc_per10dec = -egfr_discrepancy / 10 (positive when CKD-EPI Cr-Cys is below CG) plus the same adjusters used by the curves below. The HR for egfr_disc_per10dec is the multiplicative change in subHR per 10 mL/min lower eGFR discrepancy. 90-day death uses Cox PH (no competing event); all other outcomes use Fine-Gray with death as the competing event. p-values in this summary table are raw Wald (not Bonferroni-adjusted); the plot subtitles in Sections 7.1–7.11 apply Bonferroni correction across the six primary AE outcomes.

📄 Download Word table

Code 
.disc_adj_set <- function(pre_labs = NULL) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  if (!is.null(pre_labs)) base_adj <- c(base_adj, pre_labs)
  base_adj
}

fg_disc_row <- function(time_var, status_var, label, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- .disc_adj_set(pre_labs)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("egfr_disc_per10dec", time_var, status_var, adj))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  adj_df <- d[, adj, drop = FALSE]
  X_adj  <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X      <- cbind(egfr_disc_per10dec = d$egfr_disc_per10dec, X_adj)
  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])
  fit <- cmprsk::crr(time_num, stat_num, cov1 = X, failcode = 1)
  b <- unname(fit$coef[1]); se <- sqrt(fit$var[1, 1])
  hr <- exp(b); lcl <- exp(b - 1.96 * se); ucl <- exp(b + 1.96 * se)
  pv <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(b / se)))
  tibble(
    Outcome = label,
    Model   = "Fine-Gray",
    N       = nrow(d),
    `Excluded (missing cov.)` = nrow(dat) - nrow(d),
    Events  = sum(stat_num == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `(sub)HR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", hr, lcl, ucl),
    `p-value` = ifelse(pv < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pv))
  )
}

cox_disc_row <- function(time_var, status_var, label, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- .disc_adj_set(pre_labs)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("egfr_disc_per10dec", time_var, status_var, adj))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  fmla <- as.formula(paste0("Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var,
                            ") ~ egfr_disc_per10dec + ",
                            paste(adj, collapse = " + ")))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)
  b   <- unname(coef(fit)["egfr_disc_per10dec"])
  se  <- sqrt(vcov(fit)["egfr_disc_per10dec", "egfr_disc_per10dec"])
  hr  <- exp(b); lcl <- exp(b - 1.96 * se); ucl <- exp(b + 1.96 * se)
  pv  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(b / se)))
  tibble(
    Outcome = label,
    Model   = "Cox PH",
    N       = nrow(d),
    `Excluded (missing cov.)` = nrow(dat) - nrow(d),
    Events  = sum(d[[status_var]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `(sub)HR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", hr, lcl, ucl),
    `p-value` = ifelse(pv < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pv))
  )
}

disc_summary <- bind_rows(
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_anemia_2",     "cmp_status_anemia_2",     "Anemia Grade 2",                   "pre_HGB_45days"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_anemia_3",     "cmp_status_anemia_3",     "Anemia Grade 3",                   "pre_HGB_45days"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_throm_2",      "cmp_status_throm_2",      "Thrombocytopenia Grade 2",         "pre_PLT_45days"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_throm_3",      "cmp_status_throm_3",      "Thrombocytopenia Grade 3",         "pre_PLT_45days"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_aki_2",        "cmp_status_aki_2",        "AKI Grade 2"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_aki_kdigo",    "cmp_status_aki_kdigo",    "AKI (KDIGO)"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_grade_2_aes",  "cmp_status_grade_2_aes",  "Composite Grade 2 AEs"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_grade_3_aes",  "cmp_status_grade_3_aes",  "Composite Grade 3 AEs"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_any_hosp",     "cmp_status_any_hosp",     "Overall Hospitalization"),
  fg_disc_row ("cmp_time_side_effect",  "cmp_status_side_effect",  "Platinum-Related Hospitalization"),
  cox_disc_row("time_to_death_90",      "death_90",                "90-Day Death")
)

ft_disc <- flextable::flextable(disc_summary) |>
  flextable::set_caption("Multivariable (sub)HR per 10 mL/min decline in eGFR discrepancy (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys − Cockcroft-Gault). Fine-Gray for competing-risk outcomes; Cox PH for 90-day death.") |>
  flextable::autofit()
flextable::save_as_docx(ft_disc,
  path = file.path(docx_dir, "sec7_disc_summary.docx"))
ft_disc

<0.001

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_disc <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                   outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_discrepancy", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  adj_df <- d[, c(base_adj, extra_adj), drop = FALSE]
  X_adj <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X <- cbind(egfr_discrepancy = d$egfr_discrepancy, X_adj)

  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])

  fit <- cmprsk::crr(ftime = time_num, fstatus = stat_num,
                     cov1 = X, failcode = 1)

  beta   <- fit$coef[1]
  V_beta <- fit$var[1, 1]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  # subHR summaries: per 1 mL/min, and per IQR (Q3 - Q1) of egfr_discrepancy
  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  # per 10 mL/min DECLINE: HR = exp(-10 * beta); SE on log scale = 10 * se_b
  hr10  <- exp(-10 * beta);       hr10_l <- exp(-10 * beta - 1.96 * 10 * se_b);     hr10_u <- exp(-10 * beta + 1.96 * 10 * se_b)
  # per IQR DECLINE: HR = exp(-iqr_w * beta); SE on log scale = |iqr_w| * se_b
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);    hri_l <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "subHR per 10 mL/min decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.1f): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.1f, %.1f]",
    hr10, hr10_l, hr10_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_discrepancy, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x     = grid_x,
    subhr = exp(log_hr),
    lcl   = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl   = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = subhr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(q1, q3), linetype = "dashed",
               color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(x = "eGFR Discrepancy (mL/min)",
         y = "subHR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

plot_cox_linear_disc <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                 outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_discrepancy", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  fmla <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ egfr_discrepancy + ",
    paste(c(base_adj, extra_adj), collapse = " + ")
  ))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)

  beta   <- coef(fit)["egfr_discrepancy"]
  V_beta <- vcov(fit)["egfr_discrepancy", "egfr_discrepancy"]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr10  <- exp(-10 * beta);       hr10_l <- exp(-10 * beta - 1.96 * 10 * se_b);     hr10_u <- exp(-10 * beta + 1.96 * 10 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);    hri_l <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "HR per 10 mL/min decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.1f): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.1f, %.1f]",
    hr10, hr10_l, hr10_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_discrepancy, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_discrepancy, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x   = grid_x,
    hr  = exp(log_hr),
    lcl = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = hr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(q1, q3), linetype = "dashed",
               color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(x = "eGFR Discrepancy (mL/min)",
         y = "HR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

                       "pre_HGB_45days", "Anemia Grade 2")

7.10 Platinum-Related Hospitalization

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_disc("cmp_time_side_effect", "cmp_status_side_effect",
                       NULL, "Platinum-Related Hospitalization")

9 Scatter Plots — eGFR Discrepancy

9.1 eGFR Discrepancy vs CKD-EPI Cr-Cys (unindexed)

Code 
ggplot(dat %>% filter(!is.na(egfr_discrepancy)),
       aes(x = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex, y = egfr_discrepancy)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(x = "CKD-EPI Cr-Cys eGFR (unindexed, mL/min)",
       y = "eGFR Discrepancy (mL/min)",
       title = "eGFR Discrepancy vs CKD-EPI Cr-Cys eGFR") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

9.2 eGFR Discrepancy vs Cockcroft-Gault

Code 
ggplot(dat %>% filter(!is.na(egfr_discrepancy)),
       aes(x = cockcroft, y = egfr_discrepancy)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(x = "Cockcroft-Gault eGFR (mL/min)",
       y = "eGFR Discrepancy (mL/min)",
       title = "eGFR Discrepancy vs Cockcroft-Gault eGFR") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

10 CG vs CKD-EPI Cr-Cys (highlighted by Age / BMI)

For each plot below, the x-axis is Cockcroft-Gault eGFR (mL/min) and the y-axis is CKD-EPI Cr-Cys unindexed eGFR (mL/min). The dashed line is y = x (perfect agreement). Patients meeting the highlighted threshold are coloured red; all others are grey. N shown in each title is the count of patients with both eGFR values non-missing; n_red is the count meeting the red criterion.

Code 
plot_cg_vs_epi <- function(highlight_var, threshold, label) {
  d <- dat %>%
    filter(!is.na(cockcroft), !is.na(ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex),
           !is.na(.data[[highlight_var]])) %>%
    mutate(highlight = .data[[highlight_var]] >= threshold)

  n_total <- nrow(d)
  n_red   <- sum(d$highlight)

  # Fit two separate OLS models so we can annotate each with its equation + R².
  fit_true  <- lm(ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex ~ cockcroft,
                  data = d %>% filter(highlight))
  fit_false <- lm(ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex ~ cockcroft,
                  data = d %>% filter(!highlight))
  eq_str <- function(fit) {
    b  <- coef(fit)
    r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
    sprintf("y = %.2f x %+.1f   (R² = %.2f)", b[2], b[1], r2)
  }

  ggplot(d, aes(x = cockcroft, y = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex,
                color = highlight, fill = highlight)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.6) +
    # One OLS regression line per level of `highlight` (colour + CI ribbon
    # match the dot colour).
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, se = TRUE,
                alpha = 0.15, linewidth = 1) +
    annotate("text", x = 5, y = 195, hjust = 0, size = 3.4,
             color = "#E31A1C", label = paste0(">= threshold: ", eq_str(fit_true))) +
    annotate("text", x = 5, y = 182, hjust = 0, size = 3.4,
             color = "grey40",  label = paste0("< threshold:  ", eq_str(fit_false))) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "grey60", "TRUE" = "#E31A1C"),
                       guide = "none") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "grey60", "TRUE" = "#E31A1C"),
                      guide = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0, 200)) +
    labs(x = "Cockcroft-Gault eGFR (mL/min)",
         y = "CKD-EPI Cr-Cys eGFR, unindexed (mL/min)",
         title = sprintf("%s   |   N = %d, n_red = %d",
                         label, n_total, n_red)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
}

10.1 Age >= 70

Code 
plot_cg_vs_epi("age", 70, "Age >= 70")

10.6 Sex

Code 
d_sex <- dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(cockcroft), !is.na(ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex), !is.na(sex))

fit_f_sex <- lm(ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex ~ cockcroft,
                data = d_sex %>% filter(sex == "Female"))
fit_m_sex <- lm(ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex ~ cockcroft,
                data = d_sex %>% filter(sex == "Male"))
eq_str_sex <- function(fit) {
  b  <- coef(fit)
  r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
  sprintf("y = %.2f x %+.1f   (R² = %.2f)", b[2], b[1], r2)
}

ggplot(d_sex, aes(x = cockcroft, y = ckd_epi_gfr_cre_cys_unindex,
                  color = sex, fill = sex)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.6) +
  # One OLS regression line per sex (colour + CI ribbon match dot colour).
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, se = TRUE,
              alpha = 0.15, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 5, y = 195, hjust = 0, size = 3.4,
           color = "#E31A1C", label = paste0("Female: ", eq_str_sex(fit_f_sex))) +
  annotate("text", x = 5, y = 182, hjust = 0, size = 3.4,
           color = "grey40",  label = paste0("Male:   ", eq_str_sex(fit_m_sex))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Female" = "#E31A1C", "Male" = "grey60")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Female" = "#E31A1C", "Male" = "grey60"),
                    guide = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0, 200)) +
  labs(x = "Cockcroft-Gault eGFR (mL/min)",
       y = "CKD-EPI Cr-Cys eGFR, unindexed (mL/min)",
       color = NULL,
       title = sprintf("Sex   |   N = %d (Female %d, Male %d)",
                       nrow(d_sex),
                       sum(d_sex$sex == "Female"),
                       sum(d_sex$sex == "Male"))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

10.7 – 10.12 eGFR Difference (%) distribution by category

For each of the same six splits as 10.1 – 10.6, overlaid kernel density curves of the eGFR difference (%) = 100 × (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys unindexed − Cockcroft-Gault) / Cockcroft-Gault. Red = highlighted level (≥ threshold, or Female for the sex panel); grey = reference level. Dashed grey vertical line marks the 0 % concordance point; dotted verticals mark each group’s median. Subtitle carries N and median for each level plus a two-sided Mann-Whitney U p-value (equivalent to Wilcoxon rank-sum) comparing the two distributions.

Code 
plot_ratio_by_group <- function(highlight_var, threshold, label,
                                highlight_label, reference_label) {
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(egfr_diff_pct), !is.na(.data[[highlight_var]])) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(grp = factor(
      ifelse(.data[[highlight_var]] >= threshold, highlight_label, reference_label),
      levels = c(highlight_label, reference_label)))

  med_tbl <- d %>%
    dplyr::group_by(grp) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(m = median(egfr_diff_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
                     n = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")

  pval <- tryCatch(
    wilcox.test(egfr_diff_pct ~ grp, data = d)$p.value,
    error = function(e) NA_real_)
  p_str <- if (is.na(pval)) "NA" else
    ifelse(pval < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pval))

  col_vec <- setNames(c("#E31A1C", "grey50"),
                      c(highlight_label, reference_label))

  ggplot(d, aes(x = egfr_diff_pct, fill = grp, color = grp)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.35, linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
    geom_vline(data = med_tbl, aes(xintercept = m, color = grp),
               linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = col_vec) +
    scale_color_manual(values = col_vec) +
    labs(x = "eGFR difference (%): 100 × (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys − CG) / CG",
         y = "Density",
         fill = NULL, color = NULL,
         title = label,
         subtitle = sprintf(
           "%s: N = %d, median = %.1f %%   |   %s: N = %d, median = %.1f %%   |   Mann-Whitney U p = %s",
           highlight_label,
           med_tbl$n[med_tbl$grp == highlight_label],
           med_tbl$m[med_tbl$grp == highlight_label],
           reference_label,
           med_tbl$n[med_tbl$grp == reference_label],
           med_tbl$m[med_tbl$grp == reference_label],
           p_str)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "top",
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

10.7 eGFR Difference (%) by Age >= 70

Code

                    "Age >= 70", "Age < 70")

10.12 eGFR Difference (%) by Sex

Code 
d_sex_r <- dat %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(egfr_diff_pct), !is.na(sex))

med_sex <- d_sex_r %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sex) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(m = median(egfr_diff_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
                   n = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")

p_sex <- tryCatch(
  wilcox.test(egfr_diff_pct ~ sex, data = d_sex_r)$p.value,
  error = function(e) NA_real_)
p_sex_str <- if (is.na(p_sex)) "NA" else
  ifelse(p_sex < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_sex))

ggplot(d_sex_r, aes(x = egfr_diff_pct, fill = sex, color = sex)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.35, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
  geom_vline(data = med_sex, aes(xintercept = m, color = sex),
             linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Female" = "#E31A1C", "Male" = "grey50")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Female" = "#E31A1C", "Male" = "grey50")) +
  labs(x = "eGFR difference (%): 100 × (CKD-EPI Cr-Cys − CG) / CG",
       y = "Density",
       fill = NULL, color = NULL,
       title = "eGFR Difference (%) by Sex",
       subtitle = sprintf(
         "Female: N = %d, median = %.1f %%   |   Male: N = %d, median = %.1f %%   |   Mann-Whitney U p = %s",
         med_sex$n[med_sex$sex == "Female"], med_sex$m[med_sex$sex == "Female"],
         med_sex$n[med_sex$sex == "Male"],   med_sex$m[med_sex$sex == "Male"],
         p_sex_str)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))

<U+0001F4CA> Download as PowerPoint (editable)

11 Sensitivity Analysis — eGFR Difference (%) — (CKD-EPI 2012 CysC − CKD-EPI 2021 Cr) / CKD-EPI 2021 Cr, per 10 % decline

Sensitivity analysis using an alternative eGFR-difference (%) definition for the linear exposure:

  • Numerator: eGFRCYS − eGFRCR, where eGFRCYS = CKD-EPI 2012 cystatin C-only (baseline_cys_c_egfr_unindexed) and eGFRCR = CKD-EPI 2021 race-free creatinine-only (baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed).
  • Denominator: eGFRCR.
  • Percent difference: egfr_diff_pct_sens = 100 * (baseline_cys_c_egfr_unindexed - baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed) / baseline_cre_egfr_unindexed.

One row per outcome. Multivariable Fine-Gray model fit with egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10 = -egfr_diff_pct_sens / 10 plus the same adjuster set as Section 4 (eGFR difference FG adjusted for Cockcroft-Gault). The HR for this variable reads as the multiplicative subHR per 10 % decline in sensitivity eGFR difference. 90-day death uses Cox PH. p-values in this summary table are raw Wald (not Bonferroni-adjusted); the plot subtitles in Sections 11.1–11.11 apply Bonferroni correction across the six primary AE outcomes.

📄 Download Word table

Code 
.sens_adj_set <- function(pre_labs = NULL) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  if (!is.null(pre_labs)) base_adj <- c(base_adj, pre_labs)
  base_adj
}

fg_sens_row <- function(time_var, status_var, label, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- .sens_adj_set(pre_labs)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10", time_var, status_var, adj))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  adj_df <- d[, adj, drop = FALSE]
  X_adj  <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X      <- cbind(egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10 = d$egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10, X_adj)
  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])
  fit <- cmprsk::crr(time_num, stat_num, cov1 = X, failcode = 1)
  b <- unname(fit$coef[1]); se <- sqrt(fit$var[1, 1])
  hr <- exp(b); lcl <- exp(b - 1.96 * se); ucl <- exp(b + 1.96 * se)
  pv <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(b / se)))
  tibble(
    Outcome = label,
    Model   = "Fine-Gray",
    N       = nrow(d),
    `Excluded (missing cov.)` = nrow(dat) - nrow(d),
    Events  = sum(stat_num == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `(sub)HR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", hr, lcl, ucl),
    `p-value` = ifelse(pv < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pv))
  )
}

cox_sens_row <- function(time_var, status_var, label, pre_labs = NULL) {
  adj <- .sens_adj_set(pre_labs)
  d <- dat %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10", time_var, status_var, adj))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  fmla <- as.formula(paste0("Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var,
                            ") ~ egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10 + ",
                            paste(adj, collapse = " + ")))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)
  b   <- unname(coef(fit)["egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10"])
  se  <- sqrt(vcov(fit)["egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10", "egfr_diff_pct_sens_per10"])
  hr  <- exp(b); lcl <- exp(b - 1.96 * se); ucl <- exp(b + 1.96 * se)
  pv  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(b / se)))
  tibble(
    Outcome = label,
    Model   = "Cox PH",
    N       = nrow(d),
    `Excluded (missing cov.)` = nrow(dat) - nrow(d),
    Events  = sum(d[[status_var]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `(sub)HR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", hr, lcl, ucl),
    `p-value` = ifelse(pv < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pv))
  )
}

sens_summary <- bind_rows(
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_anemia_2",     "cmp_status_anemia_2",     "Anemia Grade 2",                   "pre_HGB_45days"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_anemia_3",     "cmp_status_anemia_3",     "Anemia Grade 3",                   "pre_HGB_45days"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_throm_2",      "cmp_status_throm_2",      "Thrombocytopenia Grade 2",         "pre_PLT_45days"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_throm_3",      "cmp_status_throm_3",      "Thrombocytopenia Grade 3",         "pre_PLT_45days"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_aki_2",        "cmp_status_aki_2",        "AKI Grade 2"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_aki_kdigo",    "cmp_status_aki_kdigo",    "AKI (KDIGO)"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_grade_2_aes",  "cmp_status_grade_2_aes",  "Composite Grade 2 AEs"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_grade_3_aes",  "cmp_status_grade_3_aes",  "Composite Grade 3 AEs"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_any_hosp",     "cmp_status_any_hosp",     "Overall Hospitalization"),
  fg_sens_row ("cmp_time_side_effect",  "cmp_status_side_effect",  "Platinum-Related Hospitalization"),
  cox_sens_row("time_to_death_90",      "death_90",                "90-Day Death")
)

ft_sens <- flextable::flextable(sens_summary) |>
  flextable::set_caption("Sensitivity analysis: multivariable (sub)HR per 10 % decline in eGFR difference (%) — 100 × (CKD-EPI 2012 CysC − CKD-EPI 2021 Cr) / CKD-EPI 2021 Cr — Whole cohort. Fine-Gray for competing-risk outcomes; Cox PH for 90-day death.") |>
  flextable::autofit()
flextable::save_as_docx(ft_sens,
  path = file.path(docx_dir, "sec11_egfr_ratio_sens_summary.docx"))

<0.001

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_sens <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                   outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_diff_pct_sens", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  adj_df <- d[, c(base_adj, extra_adj), drop = FALSE]
  X_adj <- model.matrix(~ ., data = adj_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  X <- cbind(egfr_diff_pct_sens = d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, X_adj)

  stat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(d[[status_var]])))
  time_num <- as.numeric(d[[time_var]])

  fit <- cmprsk::crr(ftime = time_num, fstatus = stat_num,
                     cov1 = X, failcode = 1)

  beta   <- fit$coef[1]
  V_beta <- fit$var[1, 1]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr10  <- exp(-10 * beta);      hr10_l <- exp(-10 * beta - 1.96 * 10 * se_b);   hr10_u <- exp(-10 * beta + 1.96 * 10 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);   hri_l  <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "subHR per 10 %% decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.1f %%): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.1f, %.1f] %%",
    hr10, hr10_l, hr10_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x     = grid_x,
    subhr = exp(log_hr),
    lcl   = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl   = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = subhr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(q1, q3), linetype = "dashed",
               color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(x = "Sensitivity eGFR Difference (%): 100 × (CKD-EPI 2012 CysC − CKD-EPI 2021 Cr) / CKD-EPI 2021 Cr",
         y = "subHR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

plot_cox_linear_sens <- function(time_var, status_var, extra_adj = NULL,
                                 outcome_label, n_bonf = 6) {
  base_adj <- c("age","sex","score","ecog_score_cat2","cockcroft",
                "cancer_type_cat_7","tumor_stage","platin_group","high_dose",
                "Paclitaxel","Pemetrexed","Gemcitabine","ici",
                "bmi","smoking","steroids","thyroid")
  keep <- c("egfr_diff_pct_sens", time_var, status_var, base_adj, extra_adj)
  d <- dat %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  fmla <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ egfr_diff_pct_sens + ",
    paste(c(base_adj, extra_adj), collapse = " + ")
  ))
  fit <- survival::coxph(fmla, data = d)

  beta   <- coef(fit)["egfr_diff_pct_sens"]
  V_beta <- vcov(fit)["egfr_diff_pct_sens", "egfr_diff_pct_sens"]
  se_b   <- sqrt(V_beta)

  q1    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3    <- as.numeric(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr_w <- q3 - q1
  hr10  <- exp(-10 * beta);      hr10_l <- exp(-10 * beta - 1.96 * 10 * se_b);   hr10_u <- exp(-10 * beta + 1.96 * 10 * se_b)
  hri   <- exp(-iqr_w * beta);   hri_l  <- exp(-iqr_w * beta - 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b); hri_u <- exp(-iqr_w * beta + 1.96 * abs(iqr_w) * se_b)
  pval  <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se_b)))
  pval_bonf <- min(pval * n_bonf, 1)
  p_shown <- if (n_bonf > 1) pval_bonf else pval
  p_lbl   <- if (n_bonf > 1) sprintf("p_Bonf = %s (n = %d)", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)), n_bonf) else sprintf("p = %s", ifelse(p_shown < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_shown)))
  subtitle_str <- sprintf(
    "HR per 10 %% decline: %.2f (%.2f-%.2f), %s  |  per IQR decline (Δ = %.1f %%): %.2f (%.2f-%.2f)  |  IQR: [%.1f, %.1f] %%",
    hr10, hr10_l, hr10_u, p_lbl, iqr_w, hri, hri_l, hri_u, q1, q3)

  ref_x  <- median(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, na.rm = TRUE)
  grid_x <- seq(quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
                quantile(d$egfr_diff_pct_sens, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100)

  log_hr <- beta * (grid_x - ref_x)
  se     <- sqrt((grid_x - ref_x)^2 * V_beta)

  df_plot <- tibble(
    x   = grid_x,
    hr  = exp(log_hr),
    lcl = exp(log_hr - 1.96 * se),
    ucl = exp(log_hr + 1.96 * se)
  )

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = x, y = hr)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lcl, ymax = ucl), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref_x, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(q1, q3), linetype = "dashed",
               color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(x = "Sensitivity eGFR Difference (%): 100 × (CKD-EPI 2012 CysC − CKD-EPI 2021 Cr) / CKD-EPI 2021 Cr",
         y = "HR (95% CI)",
         title = outcome_label,
         subtitle = subtitle_str) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey25"))
}

11.1 Anemia Grade 2

Code 
plot_subhr_linear_sens("cmp_time_anemia_2", "cmp_status_anemia_2",
                       "pre_HGB_45days", "Anemia Grade 2 (Sensitivity)")
